entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`overlayId` TEXT NOT NULL, `packageName` TEXT NOT NULL, `startEndTag` TEXT NOT NULL, `resourceName` TEXT NOT NULL, `resourceValue` TEXT NOT NULL, `isPortrait` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isLandscape` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isNightMode` INTEGER NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`overlayId`, `packageName`, `startEndTag`, `resourceName`, `isPortrait`, `isLandscape`, `isNightMode`))

indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_dynamic_resource_table_createdAt` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`createdAt`)
